Trick or Treat is a Halloween-based mod. It was created by [[HocusPocus]] and Andy Tran in 2004.

== Weapon list ==
* Axe
* Bats
* Black Cat
* Black Light
* Bloody Eyeballs
* Bug Spread
* Candy Corn
* Cauldron
* Dracula's Coffin
* Exploding Heart
* Flaming Pumpkin Bomb
* Fright Attack
* Ghost
* Glow-in-the-Dark Gun
* Glow-in-the-Dark Paint
* Goblin's Head
* Graveyard
* Haunted Bullets
* Milk Duds
* Nightfall
* Jawbreaker
* Pitchfork
* Pumpkin Pie
* Skeleton
* Smashing Pumpkins
* Spider Mines
* Spider Web
* Suckers
* Trick or Treat
* Web Sling
* Witch Hunt

<table cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" class="collapsible" style="background:#FFFFFF;" width="100%">
<table cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" class="collapsible" style="background:#FFFFFF;" width="100%">
<tr>
<th class="MainPageBG" style="margin:0; background: #EFEFE6; font-size:100%; font-weight:bold; border:1px solid #D5D2D2; text-align:left; color:#000; padding:0.2em 0.4em;" width="100%"> <center>Popular Mods</center>
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background: white; color:#000; margin:0; border:1px solid #a3bfb1; text-align:left; color:#000; padding:0.2em 0.4em;"> <center>   [[Liero 1.0]] | [[Liero 1.11]] | [[Modern Warfare]] | [[Cruel]] | [[8-Bit Warfare]] | [[Food Fight]] | [[WH40k]] | [[MSF]] | <strong class="selflink">Trick or Treat</strong>   </center>
</td></tr></table>
<p><br/>
</p>
<tr><td></td></tr>
</table>

[[Category:Mods]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20130323190119/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Trick_or_Treat -->
